steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ANALYSIS_START_PERIOD_DATE, ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE IN ('2024-12-31','2024-09-30') ORDER BY ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"} }
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, COMPANY_NAME, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ = '08.534.605/0001-74' AND REPORT_DATE = '2024-12-31';"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool

steps.output:
{'status': 'success', 'report': '| REPORT_DATE | COMPANY_NAME | ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED | ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY | PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED | PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY | TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED | TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 2024-12-31 | RENOVA ENERGIA S.A. | 124741981 | 0 | 124741975 | 0 | 249483956 | 0 |
'}

steps.arguments:
{"inp":{"code":"# Calculations for Renova Energia Dec 2024
ativos_total = 3061346000.0
ativo_circulante = 288269000.0
caixa = 144216000.0
aplic_fin = 5145000.0
disponibilidades = caixa + aplic_fin
passivo_circulante = 362642000.0
fornecedores = 65404000.0
patrimonio = 815951000.0
emprestimos_curto = 33691000.0
emprestimos_longo = 1110499000.0
divida_bruta = emprestimos_curto + emprestimos_longo
receita_ytd_dec = 259226000.0
ebit_ytd_dec = 16816000.0
lucro_ytd_dec = -117069000.0
# YTD to Sep values from earlier query
receita_ytd_sep = 167885000.0
ebit_ytd_sep = 64231000.0
lucro_ytd_sep = -49420000.0
# 3-month (Oct-Dec) values as difference
receita_3m = receita_ytd_dec - receita_ytd_sep
ebit_3m = ebit_ytd_dec - ebit_ytd_sep
lucro_3m = lucro_ytd_dec - lucro_ytd_sep
# shares
shares = 249483956
price = 2.60
market_cap = price * shares
# Depreciation (annual)
dep_amort = -98148000.0
# EBITDA = EBIT - DepreciationExpense (dep is negative -> subtract negative = add abs)
# Using formula EBITDA = EBIT + abs(depreciation)
edebitda = ebit_ytd_dec - dep_amort  # since dep_amort negative
# Alternatively ebit + abs(dep_amort)
# Multiples
lpa = lucro_ytd_dec / shares
vpa = patrimonio / shares
# per-share EBIT and revenue etc
ebit_per_share = ebit_ytd_dec / shares
revenue_per_share = receita_ytd_dec / shares
assets_per_share = ativos_total / shares
current_assets_per_share = ativo_circulante / shares
cap_giro = ativo_circulante - passivo_circulante
cap_giro_per_share = cap_giro / shares
# P ratios (price divided by per-share metrics)
pl = price / lpa if lpa != 0 else None
p_vp = price / vpa if vpa != 0 else None
p_ebit = price / ebit_per_share if ebit_per_share != 0 else None
psr = price / revenue_per_share if revenue_per_share !=0 else None
p_ativos = price / assets_per_share if assets_per_share !=0 else None
p_cap_giro = price / cap_giro_per_share if cap_giro_per_share !=0 else None
p_ativ_circ_liq = price / current_assets_per_share if current_assets_per_share !=0 else None
# EV
divida_liquida = divida_bruta - disponibilidades
ev = market_cap + divida_liquida
# EV multiples
ev_ebitda = ev / edebitda if edebitda != 0 else None
ev_ebit = ev / ebit_ytd_dec if ebit_ytd_dec != 0 else None
# margins
resultado_bruto = -30878000.0
marg_bruta = resultado_bruto / receita_ytd_dec * 100 if receita_ytd_dec !=0 else None
marg_ebit = ebit_ytd_dec / receita_ytd_dec * 100 if receita_ytd_dec !=0 else None
marg_liquida = lucro_ytd_dec / receita_ytd_dec * 100 if receita_ytd_dec !=0 else None
# ebit/ativo
ebit_ativo = ebit_ytd_dec / activos_total if False else None
# I mistakenly used activos_total variable not defined, correct it
ebit_ativo = ebit_ytd_dec / ativos_total * 100
# ROIC = EBIT / (Ativo - Fornecedores - Caixa)
roic_denom = ativos_total - fornecedores - caixa
roic = ebit_ytd_dec / roic_denom * 100
# ROE
roe = lucro_ytd_dec / patrimonio * 100
# Liquidez Corr
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / passivo_circulante
# Div Br/ Patrim
divbr_patrim = divida_bruta / patrimonio
# Giro Ativos
giro_ativos = receita_ytd_dec / ativos_total

# Prepare results dict
results = {
    'Ativo': ativos_total,
    'Disponibilidades': disponibilidades,
    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circulante,
    'Dív. Bruta': divida_bruta,
    'Dív. Líquida': divida_liquida,
    'Patrim. Líq': patrimonio,
    'Receita L�edquida (12 meses)': receita_ytd_dec,
    'EBIT (12 meses)': ebit_ytd_dec,
    'Lucro L�edquido (12 meses)': lucro_ytd_dec,
    'Receita L�edquida (3 meses)': receita_3m,
    'EBIT (3 meses)': ebit_3m,
    'Lucro L�edquido (3 meses)': lucro_3m,
    'P/L': pl,
    'P/VP': p_vp,
    'P/EBIT': p_ebit,
    'PSR': psr,
    'P/Ativos': p_ativos,
    'P/Cap. Giro': p_cap_giro,
    'P/Ativ Circ Liq': p_ativ_circ_liq,
    'EV / EBITDA': ev_ebitda,
    'EV / EBIT': ev_ebit,
    'LPA': lpa,
    'VPA': vpa,
    'Marg. Bruta': marg_bruta,
    'Marg. EBIT': marg_ebit,
    'Marg. L�edquida': marg_liquida,
    'EBIT / Ativo': ebit_ativo,
    'ROIC': roic,
    'ROE': roe,
    'Liquidez Corr': liquidez_corr,
    'Div Br/ Patrim': divbr_patrim,
    'Giro Ativos': giro_ativos
}

# Print nicely
for k,v in results.items():
    print(f"{k}: {v}")

# Also print market cap, EV, EBITDA, shares
print('\nComputed extras:')
print(f"Shares: {shares}")
print(f"Price: {price}")
print(f"Market Cap: {market_cap}")
print(f"EBITDA: {edebitda}")
print(f"EV: {ev}")

# Return results dict
print('\nRESULT_JSON')
import json
print(json.dumps(results))
"} }
steps.name: code_interpreter

steps.output: {'status': 'error', 'report': 'Failed to run code: embedded null byte'}

# EBIT / Ativo (%)
ebit_ativo = ebit_ytd_dec / ativos_total * 100
# ROIC
roic_denom = ativos_total - fornecedores - caixa
roic = ebit_ytd_dec / roic_denom * 100
# ROE
roe = lucro_ytd_dec / patrimonio * 100
# Liquidez Corr
liquidez_corr = ativo_circulante / passivo_circulante
# Div Br / Patrim
divbr_patrim = divida_bruta / patrimonio

giro_ativos = receita_ytd_dec / ativos_total

results = {
    'Ativo': ativos_total,

    'Ativo Circulante': ativo_circulante,

# Print summary

"} }
